title: NCERT textbook revision: Hitler references dropped, Congress' Partition stand tweaked
content: NCERT has released a revised Class 8 Social Science textbook following a Supreme Court directive. The new edition removes a controversial chapter on the judiciary and alters historical narratives. Revisions include changes to the Congress' stance on the 1947 Partition and the removal of Hitler references. The history chapter now includes Vinayak Damodar Savarkar's demand for Swaraj. This revised book focuses on the judiciary's constitutional role and its structure.

title: Bloodbath on Dalal Street! Sensex, Nifty50 tank 2% - top reasons for sharp fall
content: Stock market crash: Selling pressure gathered pace during the second half of the session after US President Donald Trump declared that the interim agreement with Iran to end the conflict was "over," reigniting fears of further escalation in the Middle East.

title: 'I can't look at you, I'm sorry': Argentina coach's post-match interview goes viral - Watch
content: Argentina coach Lionel Scaloni broke down in tears after his side's dramatic 3-2 World Cup comeback win over Egypt, walking away from a live TV interview after apologising. Argentina overturned a 2-0 deficit with late goals from Cristian Romero, Lionel Messi and Enzo Fernández. Scaloni later said, "I cried because I'm too emotional," praising his team's fighting spirit.

title: China issues security alert on Anthropic's Claude Code, flags 'backdoor' risk that can leak your...
content: China's National Vulnerability DataBase has warned that Anthropic's Claude Code contains a security "backdoor" capable of secretly sending users' location and identity data to remote servers without consent. The alert covers Claude Code versions 2.1.91 to 2.1.196 and urges users to uninstall or upgrade immediately. It comes amid rising US-China AI tensions, days after Alibaba banned employees from using the coding tool at work.

title: Egypt lodge complaint with FIFA after Argentina loss, seek referee's removal
content: The Egyptian camp was unhappy with several refereeing decisions during the match. These included a goal ruled out after a VAR review and a penalty appeal that was not reviewed in the build-up to Argentina's winning goal.

title: Meta launches AI image models, company's 'highest-paid employee' shares a 'personal photo' tip
content: Meta launched Muse Image, its first AI image generator from Meta Superintelligence Labs, alongside a preview of Muse Video. Chief AI officer Alexandr Wang, one of the company's highest-paid hires, urged users to keep it personal: upload your own photos, tag friends, and pull from trends. The launch also drew privacy backlash over a feature that uses public Instagram photos by default.

title: 'I can touch 160 kph': Ashok Sharma wants to bamboozle batters with pace | Exclusive
content: In the last six months, Ashok Sharma has caught everyone's attention with his raw pace. He shattered an 11-year-old Syed Mushtaq Ali Trophy record by picking up 22 wickets for Rajasthan. He impressed everyone in the IPL with his pace for Gujarat Titans. A couple of weeks ago, he was picked for India A as an injury replacement, and now he has earned his maiden India call-up for the Zimbabwe tour, starting on July 23.

title: Prince Harry’s Daily Mail loss may come with £50 million legal bill
content: Prince Harry and other prominent figures lost their case against the Daily Mail publisher. They had accused the company of unlawful information-gathering methods over many years. The judge dismissed all claims, stating insufficient proof of wrongdoing was presented. The claimants now face a substantial legal bill of around fifty million pounds. Associated Newspapers Ltd welcomed the ruling, calling the claims preposterous and misguided.

title: Fossil older than dinosaurs by 200 million years preserves rare detail
content: A rare fossil discovery reveals soft tissue of an ancient crinoid.  These delicate sea creatures lived over 450 million years ago.  The fossil preserves tube feet, which crinoids used for feeding.  This exceptional find offers a rare glimpse into early marine life.  Museum collections continue to yield significant paleontological discoveries.

title: Microsoft’s $7.3 billion AI data centre sued by neighbours over nonstop noise
content: Microsoft's latest AI data center in Wisconsin is under fire as residents file a lawsuit claiming the relentless noise from generators and HVAC systems is harming their property. While Microsoft asserts its dedication to being a good neighbor and has taken steps to mitigate noise, the local community remains unimpressed, especially with more data centers on the horizon that may escalate tensions.

title: 16 feared trapped after building collapses in Pune amid heavy rain
content: A three-storey administrative building at the PCMC Waste-to-Energy plant collapsed during heavy rain. Fifteen to sixteen workers are feared trapped under the debris following the afternoon incident. A large-scale rescue operation was immediately launched by the PCMC fire brigade. Personnel from the National Disaster Response Force were also rushed to assist. Rescue operations are currently underway to find those believed to be trapped.

title: Are Indians swiping less? Credit card story has grown bigger, user base hasn’t
content: India's credit card market has grown significantly over the past decade. However, credit card penetration remains low compared to global benchmarks. Younger consumers and semi-urban areas now show increased credit card ownership. Credit cards now face competition from digital payment methods like UPI. Portfolio quality has improved after pandemic-related challenges.

title: 'Would be nice to play 90 mins like Messi': Djokovic jokes after 5-hour Big W epic
content: Novak Djokovic won a record-breaking Wimbledon quarterfinal match.  He joked about Lionel Messi's shorter football games after his own marathon.  Messi inspired Argentina to a dramatic 2026 FIFA World Cup comeback victory.  Djokovic battled for over five hours to reach his eighth semifinal.  Both sporting icons proved their enduring high-level competition.

title: How Russia is trying to beat Ukraine’s drones: Camouflage cargo, jam Elon Musk's Starlink
content: In an escalating conflict, Russia is ramping up its campaign to disrupt Ukraine's Starlink satellite internet capabilities, aiming to neutralize the effectiveness of Ukrainian drone strikes on its military assets. Utilizing advanced electronic warfare systems such as Volna-Kupol-Garant, Russian forces are successfully jamming Starlink connectivity in widespread regions. In response, Ukraine has begun targeting these electronic systems to restore vital communication channels.

title: T20I Rankings: India's UK tour unravels, but Ishan & Abhishek retain top spots
content: Ishan Kishan and Abhishek Sharma hold the top two T20I batting rankings. Shreyas Iyer surged 425 places to joint 93rd in the batting rankings. England's Jacob Bethell climbed seven places to number eight in the rankings. Sam Curran rose twelve places to number 108 among batters. Adil Rashid returned to the top three T20I bowling rankings.

title: 'Not important for Denmark': Trump says US needs Greenland for 'protection of the world'
content: President Trump again urged the United States to control Greenland. He stated the Arctic island is vital for global security. Denmark's Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen rejected the demand, calling Greenland not for sale. Greenland's leadership also opposes any US acquisition of the territory. This ongoing dispute strains relations between the United States and Denmark.

title: New EPFO portal goes live! What changes for PF members
content: The Employees Provident Fund Organisation has completed its portal migration and restored online services. Members can now benefit from automated claim pre-validation and upfront error flagging. The new system offers a unified dashboard for viewing all membership details and balances. Interest credits for FY 2025-26 will be auto-processed and reflected by July 15. Advance claims up to Rs 5 lakh will now be processed through auto-settlement.

title: ‘E20 petrol can wait, pehle road sahi karo’
content: A Delhi cab driver highlights road damage costs impacting his earnings. He argues that fixing roads is more crucial than E20 petrol introduction. Poor road conditions increase vehicle repair expenses and fuel consumption significantly. Better infrastructure would improve driver income and vehicle efficiency automatically. This practical perspective underscores the immediate needs of many Indian drivers.

title: 'Welcome to the Jungle' box office Day 13: Akshay Kumar film eyes Rs 125 crore
content: Ahmed Khan’s star-studded action-comedy 'Welcome to the Jungle', featuring an ensemble cast led by Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, and Paresh Rawal, continues to draw family audiences into its second week. Despite facing a massive screen crunch due to the wide release of YRF’s high-profile spy-thriller 'Alpha', starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol, the third installment of the iconic Welcome franchise has successfully held its ground. Having comfortably cruised past the Rs. 100 crore domestic net mark over its second weekend, the film is now pursuing a stable run and netting Rs. 120.66 crore on the domestic front across regular weekdays.

title: The Neymar paradox: Brazil's greatest scorer and football's biggest debate
content: Neymar leaves as Brazil's greatest goalscorer, one of the finest footballers the country has produced and perhaps the last great Brazilian superstar whose game was built as much on joy as on efficiency. He never won the trophy that defines footballing immortality, but he gave Brazil moments that will endure for generations.

title: 'Like daughter to me': Shiv Sena neta denies hitting woman doctor, blames 'camera angle'
content: Shiv Sena corporator Ramesh Mhatre expressed regret over a physical altercation at a civic hospital. He denied assaulting a female doctor, attributing footage to camera angles. Mhatre stated he tapped the doctor's hand, considering her like a daughter. The incident occurred due to systemic hospital shortcomings, he claimed. A case has been registered against Mhatre and five others.

title: 'Not a minor mistake': Kejriwal writes to 29 automakers over E20 fuel, flags 'contradictory' claims
content: Arvind Kejriwal has written to 29 automobile manufacturers seeking clarification on E20 fuel. He wants written assurance regarding mileage and engine safety impacts on vehicles. This follows conflicting statements from company representatives and owner's manuals. Kejriwal also plans to urge the Prime Minister to make E20 fuel optional. Consumers should have choices for different fuel variants at petrol pumps.

title: Watch: Messi lifted aloft as locker room & Buenos Aires erupt after epic WC escape
content: Argentina achieved a remarkable comeback victory against Egypt in their World Cup match. The team overturned a two-goal deficit in the final thirteen minutes of play. Lionel Messi and his teammates celebrated the intense and emotional win extensively. This incredible revival keeps Argentina's World Cup dream alive for now. The team now prepares for their next quarter-final match against Switzerland.

title: Four defeats later, Gautam Gambhir's 'transition' narrative returns
content: Four defeats into India's new T20I cycle, Team India head coach Gautam Gambhir has once again leaned on the idea of a "reset" and transition to explain the team's struggles. As results worsen, the head coach's recurring narrative has returned, raising questions about India's direction after their World Cup triumph.

title: Messi pulls off another miracle comeback to bury Egypt
content: In today's Offside, we see Lionel Messi give us the footballing version of the Book of Exodus while Switzerland down Colombia in a shootout.

title: Quote of the day by Diljit Dosanjh: 'I'll keep spreading love no matter what they say.'
content: Diljit Dosanjh is breaking down barriers for Indian artists on the international stage. With his 'Aura World Tour' captivating audiences across North America and Europe through sold-out performances, he is making a mark. However, his film 'Satluj' is facing challenges with censorship in India. Despite these hurdles, Dosanjh remains committed to sharing meaningful narratives and preserves his unique identity while reaching new heights.

title: Ronaldo effect? FIFA World Cup ticket prices crash after USA, Portugal exits
content: Ticket prices for the FIFA World Cup 2026 quarterfinals have seen a notable decrease. This decline follows the unexpected eliminations of co-host United States and Portugal from the tournament. Spain's quarterfinal match against Belgium now has significantly lower ticket prices available. France's game against Morocco is currently the least expensive last-eight fixture. Other quarterfinals include Norway versus England and Argentina against Switzerland.

title: Unexplained assets alone can’t justify PMLA case, rules Allahabad high court
content: The Allahabad High Court ruled unexplained assets are not automatically proceeds of crime.  A clear link to a scheduled offense is required for PMLA action.  The court granted bail to an accused after prolonged incarceration.  The prosecution failed to demonstrate identifiable proceeds of crime arising from scheduled offenses.  This decision emphasizes the need for established nexus with criminal activity.

title: Singapore's housing story: How the Lion City wiped out its slums in six decades
content: Singapore transformed its urban landscape by eliminating slums within a generation. Over eighty percent of residents now live in government-built homes, with most owning their flats. This success was achieved through large-scale construction and the creation of complete, planned towns. Families displaced by redevelopment received alternative housing and support. Singapore's model offers lessons for cities facing housing challenges.

title: 'Are you serious?': Ex-India keeper blasts Gambhir over Harshit Rana call
content: Dinesh Karthik questioned the team management's batting order choice.  Harshit Rana was promoted ahead of Shivam Dube during a batting collapse.  India suffered their biggest T20I defeat by runs against England.  The team's performance was described as atrocious by the captain.  India now trails England two-nil in the series.

title: Trump tariff threat: India’s strong stand on US Section 301 probe that proposes 12.5% duties
content: According to policymakers and trade experts, the pace of the investigation suggests that the US may replace the existing 10% tariff, which remains in force until July 24, with the proposed forced labour-related tariff. The United States Trade Representative (USTR) has advanced one of its two investigations into America's trading partners, even as the July 24 deadline for the temporary 10% additional tariff draws closer.

title: Contract killers & a staged crash: How daughter plotted mother's murder for property
content: A daughter allegedly hired contract killers to murder her widowed mother for property. She also sought a government job on compassionate grounds after her mother's death. The mother was tragically run over by an SUV in a staged hit-and-run incident. Police have arrested the daughter, her uncle, and the alleged contract killer. The investigation into the murder continues as one suspect remains absconding.

title: Trillion-dollar gamble: Does the AI boom risk repeating the dot-com crash?
content: Central banks globally are raising concerns about the long-term viability of extensive AI investments. Historically, breakthrough technologies garner funding that exceeds mere financial benefits. Companies are pouring trillions into AI systems and sophisticated computing solutions. The BIS advocates for a careful approach, emphasizing the difference between innovation and assured future earnings. It's essential for regulators to scrutinize AI's financial frameworks and the associated systemic risks.

title: Messi scripts never-seen-before WC history as Argentina complete epic comeback
content: Lionel Messi achieved a historic World Cup milestone by scoring in six consecutive knockout matches. Argentina secured a dramatic 3-2 victory against Egypt after trailing by two goals. Messi's equaliser in the 83rd minute ignited a remarkable turnaround for his team. Enzo Fernandez then completed the stunning comeback in stoppage time to advance Argentina.

title: 'No controversy': Puri on E25 rollout confusion; Gadkari pushes for multi-fuel future
content: The government is addressing concerns about ethanol-blended fuel as E25 preparation begins. Union Minister Hardeep Singh Puri stated that automobile manufacturers report no issues with current ethanol blends. He clarified that tests for E25 fuel are ongoing and stakeholder consultations will follow. Meanwhile, Minister Nitin Gadkari is advocating for hydrogen-powered vehicles and their future use. Hydrogen trucks and buses are being introduced, with pilot projects underway for public transport.

title: 'Back to normal cricket': Archer fires warning to India after IPL batting paradise
content: Jofra Archer feels English conditions offer a return to normal cricket.  He believes bowlers have a larger margin for error here.  England secured a significant 125-run victory over India in the third T20I.  Archer dismissed Vaibhav Sooryavanshi after their IPL rivalry resurfaced.  India seek their first T20I win in the ongoing series.

title: Why are Tamil Nadu and Kerala opposed to the proposed changes in Food Security law? | Explained
content: Read on to find out why Ministers from Tamil Nadu and Kerala have voiced their concerns over the proposed amendments to the National Food Security Act

title: Parts of Maharashtra report ‘exceptional’ rain
content: Mahabaleshwar, in Maharashtra’s Satara district, received 513 mm of rainfall on July 6, which, according to the IMD’s historical records, is highest 24-hour rainfall ever recorded

title: Traffic bottleneck outside Sarath City mall leaves motorists stranded for hours on Gachibowli–Miyapur corridor; underpass, skywalk pitched
content: With up to 2.5 lakh weekend visitors, the mall frontage has become one of Hyderabad’s worst traffic hotspots as vehicles on six-lane squeeze into two-lane road. Inadequate pick-up and drop-off space cripple movement.

title: Amaravati works on schedule, says Narayana; farmers raise village issues
content: The minister sought project-wise updates from contractors and was briefed on measures taken to prevent rain-related disruptions

title: Wayanad tragedy: Greens hold Kerala govt ‘accountable’, seek suspension of further tunnel works
content: Wayanad Prakrithi Samrakshana Samiti also alleges that tunnel project was approved during the term of Left Democratic Front-led government with “suspicious haste and without adequate scientific evaluation”, overriding early warnings raised by environmentalists

title: Gujarat Cabinet removes 20-metre length restriction for fishing boat diesel VAT relief
content: Under the revised scheme, boat owners must register their vessels on the Real Craft Portal and possess a valid fishing licence to avail themselves of the benefit

title: Minister Yathindra Siddaramaiah inspects solid waste management plant, underconstruction flyovers in Mysuru
content: Dr. Yathindra directed officials to ensure that there is no negligence in waste management, and to further strengthen the system for greater efficiency

title: At least eight people feared trapped as building collapses in Pune’s Pimpri Chinchwad; rescue efforts under way
content: “Prima facie, it appears that due to heavy rains, the waste mound became loose and collapsed on top of the building,” Pimpri Chinchwad Municipal Corporation Commissioner said

title: Day 19 of CJP protest: Wangchuk loses over 7 Kg as fast enters 11th day
content: The CJP has been demanding Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan's resignation, alleging that repeated examination irregularities and paper leaks have devastated the lives of students and their families

title: All private schools in T.N. must display fee structure on notice boards, websites: Madras High Court
content: Justice M. Dhandapani issues the direction by exercising the extraordinary writ jurisdiction of the High Court under Article 226 of the Constitution

title: Rain triggers waterlogging in Delhi, disrupts traffic | Monsoon LIVE updates
content: Amit Shah speaks to Maharashtra and Gujarat Chief Ministers on rain situation, assures central assistance

title: Wayanad debris slip Live: Search on for 5 missing; Amit Shah pledges Centre's support
content: A day after a debris slip at the tunnel road construction site in Kerala's Wayanad district claimed three lives, extensive search operations are ongoing to find five people who are still missing

title: Donation 'theft' at Ram temple has tarnished India's image: Akhilesh Yadav
content: Samajwadi Party chief Akhilesh Yadav claimed that the country was suffering a loss of reputation because of the alleged actions of the ‘BJP's irreligious elements’

title: Kejriwal writes to 29 car makers on E20 fuel, seeks response on mileage impact
content: AAP national convenor Arvind Kejriwal  writes to Maruti Suzuki India Limited, Toyota Kirloskar Motor and Hero MotoCorp , seeks assurance referring to recent statements on the use of E20 fuel

title: Two killed, 27 hurt as double-decker bus rams stationary truck in U.P.'s Etawah
content: Preliminary investigation suggested that the bus driver may have fallen asleep at the wheel, leading to the accident

title: Operation Numkhor: Customs seize two more SUVs from Karnataka
content: Two Toyota Land Cruisers were reportedly seized from Bengaluru, taking the total number of vehicles seized so far to 60

title: Iltija Mufti flags shrinking Amarnath lingam, raises concerns over environmental impact
content: PDP leader says Amarnath Yatra exceeds Supreme Court cap on pilgrims, calls for sustainable environmental and tourism policy

title: NIA conducts fresh searches in Vijayawada terror-links case
content: The agency reportedly seized more evidence at Vinchipeta; the case, in which the Two Town police made arrests in March, involves alleged contacts with banned terrorist groups

title: ICU beds shown available, patient turned away: Delhi HC orders surprise hospital audits
content: The court highlighted inconsistencies in the use of the NextGen e-Hospital Management Information System (HMIS), noting that while the patient had not been assigned a Unique Health Identification (UHID) at Jag Pravesh Chandra Hospital, she was assigned one at LNJP Hospital

title: Baruipur rape-murder case: One key accused killed in police encounter
content: Violence had erupted on July 5, when the body of the minor girl was recovered from a pond at Surjapur in Baruipur; it was the first police encounter since BJP came to power in West Bengal

title: Karnataka rains: People told not to visit hills, rivers, waterfalls in Sakleshpur
content: The order informed that rainfall had increased water flow, and made the ground slippery, posing a danger to anyone venturing towards such areas

title: Tamil Nadu drew lower quantity of rice than its share under Antyodaya Anna Yojana in five of last seven years
content: From 2019-20 to 2025-26, it was during the COVID-19 pandemic year (2020-21) that the drawal was almost close to the allocated figure of around 6.99 lakh tonnes, with the off-take being about 98%. In the remaining four years, it varied from around 73% during 2022-23 and 2023-24 to 79% during 2024-25

title: India supports two-state solution for solving Israel-Palestine conflict, says PM Modi
content: In a press statement in Jakarta while presiding over the signing of multiple agreements, including the delivery of BrahMos supersonic cruise missile system and Astra Mk-1 beyond the visual-range air-to-air missiles to Indonesia, Mr. Modi says India believes that the role of dialogue and diplomacy has become more important than ever before

title: 676 Assam govt. schools without electricity, 238 lack boys’ toilets
content: Education Minister Ranoj Pegu says the State seeks to provide all essential infrastructure by March 2027

title: Kerala Maritime Board disbanded over administrative lapses, financial irregularities
content: According to a gazette notification, the Board failed to submit its annual administrative reports to the State government for the financial years 2022–23, 2023–24, and 2024–25

title: Understanding the disappearance of Egyptian Vulture in Tamil Nadu
content: Conservationists highlight the urgent need for coordinated conservation efforts including the establishment of an Egyptian Vulture Conservation Breeding Programme in the State

title: The story of India-Indonesia collaboration in the 1940s | Explained
content: From Nehru’s diplomatic support to Biju Patnaik’s daring mission, India played a significant role in Indonesia’s struggle for independence. Here’s how the partnership took shape in the 1940s

title: Ayodhya Ram Temple donation case: SIT names Avinash Shukla as prime accused
content: The SIT has, prima facie, identified nearly 70 instances of alleged theft from the temple's counting room over a span of around 40 days, they added

title: Why did the U.S. indict Lawrence Bishnoi over Hardeep Singh Nijjar’s murder?
content: The U.S. has indicted Lawrence Bishnoi, a jailed Indian gangster, for his alleged role in a transnational conspiracy linked to the murder of Khalistani separatist Hardeep Singh Nijjar in Canada in June 2023.

title: Operation Hard ball explained: Inside FBI’s crackdown on Lawrence Bishnoi and his associates
content: The FBI’s Operation Hard ball has targeted Lawrence Bishnoi’s alleged crime network. Here’s what the investigation has uncovered and why it’s significant

title: Intimidatory speech case: Abhishek Banerjee does not appear before magistrate to record voice sample
content: Abhishek Banerjee has challenged before the High Court the Bidhannagar sub-divisional judicial magistrate court order that directed him to appear before the magistrate on July 8

title: Ajay Chautala calls Haryana CM Saini a ‘dummy’ at Chanot protest site
content: JJP chief backs Chanot villagers’ protest over drinking water shortage as BJP government defends its pipeline plan

title: Punjab Police officer among 37 wanted by U.S. along with gangsters Lawrence Bishnoi, Bhagwanpuria
content: The police officer is accused of working closely with Jaggu Bhagwanpuria, 38, a gangster imprisoned in India

title: Goddess Saraswati without veena: Sculptures of Pallava, Chola eras reveal an earlier iconography
content: The veena, today regarded as inseparable from Saraswati’s identity, appears to have emerged as her dominant symbol only in the later period.

title: Punjab Congress overhaul: No question of changing the leadership, says Bhupesh Baghel
content: “The decision to retain Amarinder Singh Raja Warring as State president has been welcomed by State leaders,” Mr. Baghel said

title: T.N. BJP chief Nainar Nagenthran criticises Congress’ Manickam Tagore over Mekedatu
content: He urged the Congress to think about the welfare of the people of Tamil Nadu now that the party has become part of the Cabinet in the State

title: Congress MP from TN boycotts Karnataka CM swearing-in ceremony for his statement on Mekedatu dam issue
content: Karnataka leaders talk about constructing Mekedatu dam to divert attention of people from burning local issues, says Manickam Tagore

title: Patna court reserves order on Khan Sir's anticipatory bail plea in coaching institute firing case
content: "The court heard the arguments from both sides today, and has reserved its order till the next hearing on July 10," says Advocate, representing Mr. Khan

title: How Teejan Bai became the face of Pandavani and a folk icon
content: Teejan Bai, who passed away recently, challenged patriarchy to take Pandavani from Chhattisgarh’s villages to the world stage.

title: Nandagovindam Bhajans launches the first bhajan clubbing event in Kerala
content: ROOTS by Nandagovindam Bhajans, held in Thiruvananthapuram, saw the group regaling the audience with their popular numbers and a surprise in the form of Vineeth Sreenivasan

title: US firm CorroHealth closure: Kochi employees remain locked out of office as uncertainty looms
content: Labour department officials recorded the attendance of employees who turned up at the office on the day. This arrangement will continue until Friday, when Labour Minister is expected to hold a conciliatory meeting with senior company officials

title: Case against Sena corporator on charges of assaulting doctors in Thane hospital
content: A case was registered against Ramesh Sukrya Mhatre and five others, following outrage from the Indian Medical Association

title: Cultural heritage connect us, thank Indonesian people for preserving it: Modi at Prambanan Temple complex
content: India and Indonesia, a day ago, exchanged a Letter of Intent to start a project on the conservation and restoration of the temple complex with assistance from India

title: BJP councillor R. Sugathan suffers fresh setback as KAAPA advisory board upholds six-month detention
content: While Sugathan’s next legal option is to approach High Court, he will have to continue in prison if he fails to secure relief. In such a scenario, he also faces possibility of losing his position as a councillor in Thiruvananthapuram Corporation

title: Wayanad debris slip updates: At least three dead, five others missing; region braces for more rains
content: The government has shifted local residents to safer locations. It has also halted traffic on the Meenakshi bridge and ordered the PWD to review its structural safety

title: YSR was a legendary leader who changed crores of lives, says Y.S. Sharmila
content: Y.S. Sharmila Reddy recalled Arogyasri, the 108 ambulance service, fee reimbursement and Jalayagnam among schemes that changed the lives of the poor

title: Chief Minister Vijay “blackmailed” children by appealing to them, two election petitioners allege before Madras High Court
content: Justice V. Lakshminarayanan orders notices on the election petitions filed by DMK’s R.D. Shekar and S. Inigo Irudayaraj who had lost in Perambur and Tiruchi East constituencies

title: Tribunal awards ₹31.43 lakh compensation to kin of Thane man killed in 2020 road accident
content: In its order on July 8, the MACT directed the owner of a tempo involved in the accident and its insurer to jointly and severally pay the amount to the family of the victim, Rajaram Narayan Mhatre, with 9% interest per annum from the date of the petition

title: Building Collapses After Garbage Mound Falls On It Near Pune, 15 Trapped
content: Most of those trapped are believed to be the employees of the private company who were at work inside the building.

title: Assam's Inter-State Boundary Disputes, Encroachment Issue Raised In Assembly
content: When new states were created, the boundaries were not fully demarcated, leading to disputes along border regions, said Atul Bora

title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Trump Says Iran Ceasefire 'Over', But Open To Continued Talks
content: Iran War: The United States launched "power strikes" against Iran following a series of attacks by Tehran on commercial ships near the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Stock Market Crash, Sensex Today: Sensex Tanks 1,650 Points At Close As Trump Says US-Iran Deal "Is Over"
content: Stock Market, Sensex, Share Market, Nifty Highlights: Brent crude rose to $76.18 a barrel, while US WTI was up 2.87% to $72.46.

title: Punjab Cop Transferred After US Charges Him In Case Linked To Indian Gangs
content: The cop is accused of helping gangsters extort $400,000 from a family in Los Angeles by threatening to file false murder charges against their relatives in India.

title: Automakers Record Best-Ever June Despite Iran War, Weak Monsoon Outlook
content: According to experts, auto sales in June reflect the strength of India's economy, resilient consumer confidence and robust rural demand.

title: How Batman: The Animated TV Series Predicted Modern AI In 1992
content: Long before ChatGPT and AI agents, Batman was already asking the questions the world is debating today.

title: "It's A Waste Of Time": Trump Says US-Iran Deal To End War Is "Over"
content: Trump said that US representatives can continue negotiations but he cast doubt on the outcome. "They can talk, but I think they're wasting their time," he said.

title: Weather LIVE Updates: Delhi-NCR Receives Heavy Rain, More Showers Predicted Over Next 5 Days
content: Weather Today, Delhi-NCR Rain, Monsoon Live Updates: Delhi witnesses its wettest day with heavy rains causing waterlogged roads and traffic congestion.

title: Trump Warns Trade Cut With Spain, Renews Push For Greenland At NATO Summit
content: While Trump is still smarting from the European response to his war with Iran, he still also has not dropped his desire for NATO member Denmark's territory of Greenland.

title: Explained: Why Landslides Keep Devastating India's Most Vulnerable Regions
content: The biggest catalyst for landslides in India is considered to be the Southwest Monsoon, which mostly spans the period from June to September.

title: Ground Report: 4 Rescue Zones And Race Against Time In Landslide-Hit Wayanad
content: The rescue operation is underway in all four zones to fast-track the efforts to save five trapped persons in landslide-hit Wayanad

title: Amit Shah Speaks To Maharashta, Gujarat, J&K Chief Ministers On Rain Situation
content: During the separate phone conversations, Amit Shah assured them of all possible assistance from the Centre in dealing with the rain-related situation, they said.

title: 12,000 Cops, Drones: Odisha Rolls Out Security Plan For Puri Rath Yatra
content: The security blueprint mostly focuses on crowd control, traffic management and emergency response on the land, while drone and anti-drone devices to look after aerial security.

title: Debutant vs Debutant: Who Is Abhishek Kumar, BJP's Pick Against Prashant Kishor For Bihar Bypoll
content: Regarded as a close aide of BJP chief Nitin Nabin, Abhishek Kumar served as the Vice-President of the BJP Yuva Morcha in the Bankipur region.

title: Lawsuit Alleges Trump Administration Of Giving Asylum Seekers' Data To Iran
content: The US has provided "detailed information on hundreds of Iranian detainees seeking asylum," complaints Iranian American Legal Defense Fund and Public Citizen Litigation Group

title: EU Court Rejects Apple Challenge To Landmark Tech Rules
content: EU's General Court has dismissed Apple's challenge against its designation as a gatekeeper for the App Store and iOS under the DMA

title: PM Modi Leaves For Australia After Indonesia Visit, 14 Pacts Signed
content: During the visit, PM Modi held bilateral talks with Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto, who dropped him off at the airport.

title: 'Bengal becoming UP 2.0': Mahua Moitra reacts after Baruipur rape-murder accused shot dead
content: The TOI News Desk comprises a dedicated and tireless team of journalists who operate around the clock to deliver the most current and comprehensive news and updates to the readers of The Times of India worldwide. With an unwavering commitment to excellence in journalism, our team is at the forefront of gathering, verifying, and presenting breaking news, in-depth analysis, and insightful reports on a wide range of topics. title: US charges Bishnoi, Brar in Nijjar murder, stops short of naming India
content: alias goldy brar charged with ordering the assassination of Hardeep Singh Nijjar . but neither the indictment nor US officials accused the government of India or any Indian official of directing, facilitating or participating in the killing . the distinction is significant because the murder precipitated one of the worst diplomatic crises in India-Canada relations .
